user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: IKEA
Product type: KALLAX shelf unit
Tone: functional, approachable, modern
Visual style: Clean, minimalist visuals with bright, natural lighting emphasizing simplicity and versatility.
Conceptual technique: practical lifestyle demonstration
Format: image

brief.headline: SHELVES OF POSSIBILITIES
brief.caption: A neatly organized living room showcasing the KALLAX shelf unit filled with books, plants, and decorative items, illustrating its adaptability and style in a modern home setting.
brief.visual_style: Clean, minimalist visuals with bright, natural lighting emphasizing simplicity and versatility.
brief.call_to_action: Explore the KALLAX range at IKEA
brief.typography_style: IKEA’s bold, sans-serif typeface (similar to Futura or Verdana), clean and readable
brief.color_scheme: light wood tones, white, and IKEA’s iconic blue and yellow branding
